Based on the visual inspection of the molecule, atom index 18 (C) is covalently connected to the following neighbor atoms:
- Atom index 17 (element: C)
- Atom index 19 (element: C)
- Atom index 22 (element: H)

The `geomconf_index` is 8154.

question: Please find neighbour atoms of atom index 18 (element: C). Neighbour atoms are covalently connected. Report their atomic indices and elements. Also return the geomconf_index.
